title: The Island’s Past Takes Shape
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Narrator, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Fish-Men, Robin, Jinbe, King Neptune. The core story beat is the island’s past takes shape.
scene: The scene centers on the island’s past takes shape, with Narrator, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Fish-Men, Robin, Jinbe, King Neptune driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man who freed our kind from that terror...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was none other than the late Whitebeard...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: From now on...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...this island is my territory!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: and so peace returned to our island.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: But the hatred that the humans felt towards our kind lived on...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You all must have witnessed the truth for yourselves on the Sabaody archipelago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: And so it was that the closer one looked to the central spheres of govern- ment, who held sway over human-fishman relations...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the deeper- set were the discriminatory prejudices that could be found among them...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was in the midst of this seemingly hopeless situation that two individuals rose up, and made their valiant attempts...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: ...to change the course of history...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: ...was queen Otohime.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: She preached at length to her subjects of the importance of living in harmony with humans.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: As you know, she was Princess Shirahoshii's mother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and the other individual...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: ...was Fisher Tiger, the hero of slaves.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: He, for his part, resolved that Fishmen and humans should go their separate ways. And so, breaking a great taboo...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...He mounted a lone assault upon the Holy Land of Mariejoa, freeing the slaves held captive there...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: thingy Tiger...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've heard that name some- where...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Following this great feat, he gathered the former fishman slaves...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: ...and formed a group known as the "Sun Pirates"...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: both I and Arlong, as well as Hachi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...were once members of that pirate crew...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: However, the existence of this dangerous band of fishman pirates, who had to flagrantly defined the world government...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: ...Also had the unfortunate effect of sealing the fate of Queen Otohime, and her dream of harmony between races...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: queen otohime chose to endure the suffering of the present, in hope of building a better future...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Whilst Fisher Tiger abandoned such hopes for the future, in favour of saving those who were suffering there and then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot say which of their ideals was the greater.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All I can say, is this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Enemy Vessel sighted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fifteen years ago; the Grand Line

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's an enemy ship!! Nyuu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Boss!! Boss!! Boss!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Quit your yapping, Hachi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You are a noisy one...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Boss Tiger!!! It's terrible!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Is it the Marines?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: (a seabream fishman) (saviour of the pirate empress Hangock)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Captain

summary: The Island’s Past Takes Shape. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
